ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule (e.g., SC - Consolidated Statement of Condition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial statement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the financial statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the financial statement was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial statement (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the schedule belongs to */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule (e.g., General Valuation Allowances) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the schedule within the financial statement */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule the line item belongs to */,
  "line_item_name" TEXT /* Name of the line item (e.g., SC229, SUB0092) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line item */,
  "line_item_type" TEXT /* Type of line item (e.g., asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number associated with the line item */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuation_allowances" (
  "allowance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation allowance */,
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the line item the allowance belongs to */,
  "allowance_name" TEXT /* Name of the valuation allowance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the valuation allowance */,
  "allowance_type" TEXT /* Type of valuation allowance (e.g., general, specific) */,
  "allowance_amount" REAL /* Amount of the valuation allowance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allowance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuation_allowances_line_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_item_id") REFERENCES line_items ("line_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortgage_loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortgage loan */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule the loan belongs to */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of mortgage loan (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  "gross_value" REAL /* Gross value of the mortgage loan */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the mortgage loan */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the mortgage loan (e.g., active, paid off, defaulted) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the mortgage loan */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the mortgage loan (e.g., number of years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortgage_loans_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construction_loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construction loan */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule the loan belongs to */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of construction loan (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the construction loan */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the construction project associated with the loan */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the construction project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construction_loans_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial period (e.g., Dec 2008, Sep 2008) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of financial period (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year associated with the financial period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule the data belongs to */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period the data belongs to */,
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the line item the data belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of financial data (e.g., actual, budgeted, forecasted) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_line_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_item_id") REFERENCES line_items ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)
